Normal Attacks.name: Standing Light Punch
Normal Attacks.notes: As of March 2026 patch: can chain cancel.

Normal Attacks.name: Standing Medium Punch
Normal Attacks.notes: Has 16 frames of recovery on hit, but 18 on whiff. In February 27, 2024 patch: active frames increased from 3 to 5.

Normal Attacks.name: Standing Medium Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: Has 15 recovery frames on hit, but 17 on whiff.

Normal Attacks.name: Standing Heavy Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: Stagger of +12 on Punish Counter, limited juggle state on anti-air Punish Counter.

Normal Attacks.name: Crouching Light Punch
Normal Attacks.notes: In February 27, 2024 patch: increased hitbox size forward.

Normal Attacks.name: Crouching Medium Punch
Normal Attacks.notes: 18 recovery frames on hit, 21 on whiff. June 2025 patch: startup from 8 to 7 frames.

Normal Attacks.name: Crouching Heavy Kick
Normal Attacks.notes: Limited juggle state on Punish Counter, Knockdown +48. June 2025 patch: increased hurtbox around feet.

Unique Attacks.name: Down-Forward + Medium Punch (Pu Lao)
Unique Attacks.notes: As of March 2026 patch: -3 on block.

Unique Attacks.name: Forward + Heavy Punch (Chi Wen)
Unique Attacks.notes: 20 recovery frames on hit, but 21 on whiff.

Unique Attacks.name: Forward + Heavy Kick (Qiu Niu)
Unique Attacks.notes: 16 recovery frames on hit, but 24 on whiff. Low Crushes on frames 11-26.

Target Combos.name: Light Punch, Light Punch (Hun Dun)
Target Combos.notes: Second hit always scales to 270. Second hit has 14 recovery frames on hit, but 16 on whiff. As of March 2026 patch, second hit is +1 on hit (unchanged from -3 on block, despite patch notes saying it was).

Target Combos.name: Heavy Punch, Heavy Punch (Qiong Qi)
Target Combos.notes: Second hit Poisons on hit. 24 recovery frames on hit, but 29 on block. Knockdown of +54 if opponent is already poisoned. Detonates Poison (Toxic Blossom) when hitting a poisoned opponent.

Special Moves.name: Nightshade Pulse
Special Moves.notes: Poisons on hit. Cancellable into Forward+HP followup (Nightshade Chaser) on frames 30-36. Cancellable into OD Snake Step on frames 35-36.

Special Moves.name: Nightshade Pulse (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Poisons on hit. Cancellable into Forward+HP followup (Nightshade Chaser) on frames 34-35. Cancellable into OD Snake Step on frames 32-33. Second hit puts opponent into a limited juggle state. Initial scaling of 20%.

Special Moves.name: Nightshade Chaser
Special Moves.notes: Poisons on hit. Detonates Poison (Toxic Blossom) when hitting a poisoned opponent. Possible to have up to a 5-frame delay for activation.

Special Moves.name: Nightshade Chaser, Burst
Special Moves.notes: Poisons on hit. Detonates the Nightshade Pulse.

Special Moves.name: Nightshade Chaser (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Poisons on hit. Detonates Poison (Toxic Blossom) when hitting a poisoned opponent. Possible to have up to a 5-frame delay for activation.

Special Moves.name: Nightshade Chaser (Overdrive), Burst
Special Moves.notes: Poisons on hit. Detonates the Nightshade Pulse. Different advantage on hit/block if both Nightshade Pulse projectile hits connect first, versus one hit first, versus only detonation hitting.

Special Moves.name: Orchid Spring
Special Moves.notes: Places a pool on the ground for 160 frames. Poisons opponent (unblockable). Re-applies poison as long as opponent is in range. Can only have one Orchid Spring active at a time.

Special Moves.name: Orchid Wreath
Special Moves.notes: Poisons on hit. Limited juggle state on hit. Not a projectile, so will not clash with other projectiles.

Special Moves.name: Serpent Lash (Light Punch)
Special Moves.notes: Poisons on hit. Detonates Poison (Toxic Blossom) when hitting a poisoned opponent. 20 recovery frames on hit, but 26 on whiff. Clashes with projectiles, but is a strike.

Special Moves.name: Serpent Lash (Medium Punch)
Special Moves.notes: Poisons on hit. Detonates Poison (Toxic Blossom) when hitting a poisoned opponent. Forces a Crumple when detonating Poison. Only the early active frames will hit grounded opponents.

Special Moves.name: Serpent Lash (Heavy Punch)
Special Moves.notes: Poisons on hit. Detonates Poison (Toxic Blossom) when hitting a poisoned opponent. Anti-air invincible on frames 6-16.

Special Moves.name: Serpent Lash (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Poisons on hit. Detonates Poison (Toxic Blossom) when hitting a poisoned opponent. Forces a Crumple when detonating Poison. Clashes with projectiles, but is a strike.

Special Moves.name: Cruel Fate (Light Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Knockdown on airborne opponents.

Special Moves.name: Cruel Fate (Medium Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Knockdown on airborne opponents.

Special Moves.name: Cruel Fate (Heavy Kick)
Special Moves.notes: Knockdown on airborne opponents.

Special Moves.name: Cruel Fate (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: Knockdown on airborne opponents. Can hold left/right to steer the move. Hit-grab animation on early hit. Non-hitgrab version can cancel into Level 3 Super as of May 2024.

Special Moves.name: Snake Step (Light Kick)
Special Moves.notes: A fake/feint dash. Upper body projectile invincible on frames 8-37. Moves backwards as of May 2024.

Special Moves.name: Snake Step (Medium Kick)
Special Moves.notes: A command dash. Upper body projectile invincible on frames 9-38. Will not cross up.

Special Moves.name: Snake Step (Heavy Kick)
Special Moves.notes: A command dash. Upper body projectile invincible on frames 11-40(50...54). Can cross up.

Special Moves.name: Snake Step (Overdrive)
Special Moves.notes: A command dash. Can cross up. Strike invincible on frames 1-34, Projectile invincible on frames 1-42. Strike and Projectile invincible for entire duration on cross up. Throws will punish counter for the entire duration of the move.

Special Moves.name: Sinister Slide
Special Moves.notes: Can be cancelled with "Up" input. Upper body projectile invincible on frames 10-197. Followups are usable from frame 11 onward, stance-cancel from frame 28 onward.

Special Moves.name: Venomous Fang
Special Moves.notes: Poisons on hit. Detonates Poison (Toxic Blossom) when hitting a poisoned opponent. Forces a Crumple when detonating Poison.

Special Moves.name: Heel Strike
Special Moves.notes: 17 recovery frames on hit, but 20 on whiff. Limited juggle state on aerial opponents.

Special Moves.name: Entrapment
Special Moves.notes: 17 recovery frames on hit, but 20 on whiff. Limited juggle state on aerial opponents.

Super Arts.name: Deadly Implication (Level 1)
Super Arts.notes: Strike/throw invincible on frames 1-12. Breaks armor. Poisons on hit.

Super Arts.name: Tainted Talons (Level 2)
Super Arts.notes: Breaks armor. Creates an ublockable poison pool for ~700 frames (does not prevent Orchid Spring pools). Light/Medium/Heavy Punch determines attack distance as well a the placement of the poison pool. MP and HP versions make the poison pool move forward slowly.

Super Arts.name: Claws of Ya Zi (Level 3)
Super Arts.notes: Fully invincible on frames 1-12. Breaks armor. Critical Art in parenthesis.
